WITH category_revenue AS (
  SELECT
    p.category,
    SUM(o.total_amount) AS revenue
  FROM ecommerce.orders o
  JOIN ecommerce.order_items oi ON o.order_id = oi.order_id
  JOIN ecommerce.products p ON oi.product_id = p.product_id
  WHERE o.status <> 'cancelled'
  GROUP BY p.category
),
total_revenue AS (
  SELECT SUM(revenue) AS grand_total FROM category_revenue

FROM category_revenue cr
CROSS JOIN total_revenue tr
ORDER BY revenue_share DESC;

  JOIN ecommerce.products p ON oi.product_id = p.product_id

results.question: What is the revenue per customer by order month in 2024?

JOIN ecommerce.orders o ON c.customer_id = o.customer_id
